---
title: "Applied Economics Analysis Final Project"
date: 2026-04-04
author:
  - name: Jorge Luis Ochoa Rincón
    url: https://jorgeluis8ar.github.io/
    orcid: 0009-0004-4113-8724
    affiliation: Department of Economics, Brown University
categories:
  - Coursework
  - Applied economics
  - Research design
pub-info:
  reference: >-
    <strong>Jorge Luis Ochoa Rincón</strong>, “Applied Economics Analysis Final Project” (course project in development)
  links:
    - name: GitHub
      url: https://github.com/jorgeluis8ar
      icon: bi bi-github
---

## Overview

This page is a placeholder for the final project connected to Applied Economics Analysis. As the semester develops, this entry will become the home for the project description, supporting materials, and any final outputs that belong on the website.
